choicesItalian: Buongiorno, quanto costano queste cartoline?
Buongiorno, dove posso mangiare una pizza?

correctAnswerEnglish: Good morning, how much do these postcards cost?

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Un inizio di conversazione classico in un negozio di souvenir.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, we are looking for the specific request about the price of postcards.

choicesItalian: Quelle grandi un euro, quelle piccole cinquanta centesimi.

Quelle grandi dormono sempre, quelle piccole non dormono mai.
choicesEnglish: The large ones one euro, the small ones fifty cents.
The large ones eat bread, the small ones eat cheese.
The large ones go to Rome, the small ones go to Milan.
The large ones always sleep, the small ones never sleep.

correctAnswerEnglish: The large ones one euro, the small ones fifty cents.

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, we are talking about the differentiated cost of the items.
